title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. subcaesioides
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. subcaesioides, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like plant family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, wound healing, and reducing fever. Hieracium schmidtii subsp. subcaesioides can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
